summary: Full implementation of hub-mvp-web: single-view home, redesigned cards with 5 always-visible named sections (BLOCKERS, PIPELINE, QUALITY, GIT, VERSION), web admin panel at /admin with CRUD API, CLI setup/monitor deprecation notices, dark-mode-only, and app version in card header.

files_modified.change: Replaced interactive CLI flow with deprecation notice printing http://localhost:3000/admin and exiting 0. No readline, no file writes.
Added /api/projects CRUD route handler block before static file fallback. GET/POST/PUT/DELETE with path traversal validation, atomic writes via renameSync, and stdout logging per NFR-011.
Added unpushedCommits (number|null) and uncommittedFiles (number|null) to readGitMeta return value. null = no tracking branch or command unavailable.
Imported readAppVersion and added appVersion field to each project entry in collectOne.
Imported cmdMonitor from new monitor.js; replaced inline console.log with cmdMonitor() call in 'monitor' case.
Removed 7-tab navigation. Added useRoute() hook (15-line custom URL router using useState + popstate). Routes / to HomeView and /admin to AdminPanel. Removed all tab state and tab-related imports.
Removed theme state, toggleTheme, localStorage access, and theme toggle button. Removed useCallback import. Added isAdmin prop for conditional subtitle. Dark-mode only.

Full redesign into 5 always-visible named sections: BLOCKERS (conditional on alerts), PIPELINE (bar + last event), QUALITY (tests, FR coverage, spec quality, compliance), GIT (branch, unpushed, uncommitted), VERSION (aitri version). App version shown below name in card header.
Removed [data-theme='light'] block (54 lines). Changed ':root,[data-theme="dark"]' to ':root'. Added card section styles, admin panel styles, button styles, dialog styles.

files_created.purpose: Deprecated monitor command: prints http://localhost:3000 and exits 0. No screen clear, no polling.
Reads project's own version from package.json .version or VERSION file. Returns string|null.
Fetch wrappers for /api/projects: getProjects, addProject, updateProject, removeProject.
Single-view home (renamed from OverviewTab). Removed phase distribution and health score panels. Kept stat tiles, triage section, project grid.
Root admin component: fetches project list, manages add/edit/remove state, renders subcomponents.
Renders project rows with inline edit and remove controls.
Inline form to add a project: name, type (local/remote), location. Inline validation errors.
Modal confirmation dialog before removing a project.

test_results.notes: All 10 pre-existing component tests pass. New feature tests (TC-010h through TC-e2e-admin-remove) are in the test plan and can be implemented now that the production code exists.

build_verification.output: 41 modules transformed, 0 errors. No [data-theme='light'] in compiled CSS bundle.
